name: testimonials-component-18
description: Basic carousel testimonials with badge design, avatar displays, and simple customer feedback structure

files.content:
import TestimonialsComponent from '@/registry/new-york/components/blocks/testimonials-component-18/testimonials-component-18'
import type { TestimonialItem } from '@/registry/new-york/components/blocks/testimonials-component-18/testimonials-component-18'

const testimonials: TestimonialItem[] = [
  {
    name: 'Craig Bator',
    role: 'CEO & Co Founder',
    company: 'Zendesk',
    avatar: 'https://cdn.shadcnstudio.com/ss-assets/avatar/avatar-1.png?width=40&height=40&format=auto',
    rating: 5,
    content: "I've been using shadcn/studio for a year now and it's made managing my finances so much easier and quick."
  },
  {
    name: 'Martin Dorwart',
    role: 'Product manager',
    company: 'Orbit',
    avatar: 'https://cdn.shadcnstudio.com/ss-assets/avatar/avatar-2.png?width=40&height=40&format=auto',
    rating: 4,
    content: "With shadcn/studio, I can easily track my investments and see how they're performing in real-time."
  },
  {
    name: 'Sarah Johnson',
    role: 'Lead Designer',
    company: 'Figma',
    avatar: 'https://cdn.shadcnstudio.com/ss-assets/avatar/avatar-3.png?width=40&height=40&format=auto',
    rating: 5,
    content:
      "The UI components are beautifully designed and incredibly easy to customize. It's transformed our design workflow."
  },
  {
    name: 'Alex Chen',
    role: 'Frontend Developer',
    company: 'Vercel',
    avatar: 'https://cdn.shadcnstudio.com/ss-assets/avatar/avatar-4.png?width=40&height=40&format=auto',
    rating: 4,
    content:
      'shadcn/studio has saved us countless hours in development. The component library is comprehensive and well-documented.'
  }
]

const TestimonialsComponentPage = () => {
  return <TestimonialsComponent testimonials={testimonials} />
}

export default TestimonialsComponentPage

import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from '@/registry/new-york/ui/avatar' import { Badge } from '@/registry/new-york/ui/badge' import { Carousel, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselNext, CarouselPrevious } from '@/registry/new-york/ui/carousel' export type TestimonialItem = { name: string role: string company: string avatar: string rating: number content: string } type TestimonialsComponentProps = { testimonials: TestimonialItem[] } const TestimonialsComponent = ({ testimonials }: TestimonialsComponentProps) => { return (
{/* Left Content */}
Testimonials

Trusted by leaders from various industries

From career changes to dream jobs, here's how Shadcn Studio helped.

{/* Right Testimonial Carousel */}
{testimonials.map((testimonial, index) => (

“

{testimonial.content}

{testimonial.name .split(' ', 2) .map(n => n[0]) .join('')}

{testimonial.name}

{testimonial.role} at {testimonial.company}

))}
) } export default TestimonialsComponent
